title: A Difficult Customer
content: Lily had worked at the clothing store for almost three years, so she was used to handling different kinds of customers. One afternoon, however, a man entered the store already looking frustrated. He complained loudly about a jacket he had purchased the week before and demanded an immediate refund. Although the situation became uncomfortable, Lily remained calm and listened carefully to his concerns. After checking the receipt and store policy, she explained the available options politely. Eventually, the customer accepted an exchange instead of a refund and left the store much calmer than before. Her manager later thanked Lily for handling the difficult situation professionally without losing patience or becoming defensive.
